project.name: MileStream
project.description: MileStream is a hybrid contractor-credential asset formed through HACD Stack. At launch, each lot forms MSTR and a permanent Contractor ID. Milestone payments are planned via Hacash HVM smart contracts.

asset.utility_summary: Each MSTR unit represents one share of a contractor credential formed through a HACD Stack lot. The unique HACD name acts as a permanent Contractor ID. Holders can verify formation on the Hacash explorer. Contractor directory listing is available at launch. Hacash HVM milestone payment contracts (e.g. 25% start / 75% delivery) are a Phase 2 product layer in development.

copy.headline: Freelancer trust, formed through HACD.
copy.subheadline: MileStream issues MSTR — a hybrid credential where each HACD becomes a permanent Contractor ID. Milestone payments are planned via Hacash HVM smart contracts.
copy.short_description: MSTR is formed across 200 HACD lots at 50 HAC each. Each lot forms 5,000 MSTR and one unique Contractor ID. Total supply is 1,000,000 MSTR. Formation cost filters fake profiles. Hacash HVM milestone contracts are on the roadmap.
copy.risk_disclosure: MSTR is a utility Stack Asset for contractor credentials, not an investment product. No price, liquidity, listing, or return is guaranteed. HVM milestone payment features depend on Hacash smart-contract development and are not live at launch. Formation cost is non-refundable. MileStream does not provide legal escrow or dispute arbitration. Final parameters pending HACD Labs review.

notes: Hybrid FT+NFT: MSTR is fungible credential weight; HACD name is unique Contractor ID.
Launch = HACD Stack contractor identity. Roadmap = Hacash HVM milestone payment contracts.
First phase (20 lots) reserved for pilot contractors during sprint week.
Maximum 5 HACD per participant must be enforced at Launchpad level.
Contractor directory live; HVM payment contracts not yet deployed.
